name: Zucchini Pesto Quiche
recipeIngredient: 3 small zucchini (halved and cut into 1/4-inch slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Precook the zucchini by sautéing in butter or microwaving for 5 minutes.
2. Cool and drain excess moisture from the zucchini.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the zucchini, pesto, cheeses, seasonings, and pepper.
4. Place the filling mound into the pastry shell.
5. Whisk the eggs and half-and-half until smooth.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the filling.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 30 minutes or until done. If the top browns too quickly, cover with foil.
8. Quiche is done when a knife inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow to stand on a wire rack for 5-10 minutes before cutting.
9. Serve hot. Quiche may be reheated. Great with sour cream.)
